name: Multi-severity violation batch repair
prompt: El changelog de estilo reporta 5 violaciones en U2: 1 critica (uso de 'tu' en seccion docente que requiere 'usted'), 2 mayores (registro informal 'ojo que' y 'un monton de' en texto expositivo), 2 menores (nominalizaciones 'la realizacion del experimento', 'la comprension del texto'). Aplica todas las correcciones.
expected_behavior: Processes the critical violation first (tu -> usted)
Fixes both major violations (informal register replacements)
Each correction includes before/after text in the report
No pedagogical content is altered (meaning preservation verified)

name: Contextual tone exception handling
prompt: El changelog marca la frase 'Dale con todo, tu puedes!' en la seccion 'Ponte pilas' como violacion de registro informal (V-01). Sin embargo, 'Ponte pilas' es una seccion intencionalmente informal segun el Manual de Voz Sinapsis. Maneja correctamente esta excepcion.
expected_behavior: Recognizes that 'Ponte pilas' is a contextual tone exception per the voice manual
Does NOT apply the formal register correction
Classifies the violation as a false positive with justification
Repair report shows '1 false positive (justified)' instead of '1 correction applied'
Cites the voice manual rule that permits informal tone in this section

name: Correction that would alter curricular term
prompt: El changelog sugiere cambiar 'Los estudiantes evaluaran criticamente las fuentes' a 'Los estudiantes revisaran las fuentes' para simplificar. Sin embargo, 'evaluar criticamente' es el verbo taxonomico de Bloom nivel 5 vinculado a la destreza DZ-LENG-6-12. Protege el termino curricular.
expected_behavior: Identifies 'evaluar criticamente' as a Bloom taxonomy verb tied to a destreza
Does NOT apply the suggested correction
Logs the entry as 'requires manual review' with explanation
Tags with [SUPUESTO] for style-corrector human review
Suggests an alternative fix that preserves the taxonomy verb (e.g., restructure sentence without changing the verb)
